channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 6fe711ec-654d-4ef7-8e32-eb7de3d94774
Display name: Defender AI
Description: Service role that provides permissions for Microsoft Defender for AI
Link: https://management.azure.com/6fe711ec-654d-4ef7-8e32-eb7de3d94774?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 78739afa-3ece-4d6b-90ba-762fdccd7438
Display name: Azure Edge On-Site Deployment Manager
Description: Grants you access to take actions as an on-site person to assist in the provisioning of an edge device
Link: https://management.azure.com/78739afa-3ece-4d6b-90ba-762fdccd7438?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 56eda3c5-3834-4815-bd41-6f8fa1295247
Display name: EntraBackup.Read.All
Description: Read Preview jobs and snapshots
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/56eda3c5-3834-4815-bd41-6f8fa1295247

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 227900ff-df89-40f8-90e2-8157cf6995d5
Display name: Policy.Read.B2BManagementPolicy
Description: Read your organization's B2BManagement policies
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/227900ff-df89-40f8-90e2-8157cf6995d5

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 886bd2d9-5b8b-4b49-adea-ca75fb50d9ef
Display name: Policy.ReadWrite.B2BManagementPolicy
Description: Read and write your organization's B2BManagement policies
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/886bd2d9-5b8b-4b49-adea-ca75fb50d9ef
